title: Excel to PDF
metaDescription: Convert Excel spreadsheets (XLSX) to PDF. Preserve tables and data in your converted documents.
description:
Excel to PDF converts Microsoft Excel spreadsheets into PDF format while preserving table structure and data organization.

Upload your XLSX files and get clean PDF output with properly formatted tables. Each sheet in your workbook becomes a separate section in the PDF.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your data remains private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload Excel File
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your .xlsx file or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Wait for Processing
howToUse.description: The tool will load the spreadsheet and convert all sheets.

howToUse.title: Download PDF
howToUse.description: Click Download to save your converted PDF document.

useCases.title: Report Sharing
useCases.description: Convert Excel reports to PDF for distribution to stakeholders.

useCases.title: Data Archiving
useCases.description: Archive spreadsheet data in stable PDF format.

useCases.title: Print Preparation
useCases.description: Create print-ready PDFs from Excel worksheets.

faq.question: Are multiple sheets supported?
faq.answer: Yes, all sheets in the workbook are converted and included in the PDF.

faq.question: Is .xls format supported?
faq.answer: Currently only .xlsx format is supported. Please save .xls files as .xlsx first.

faq.question: Are formulas preserved?
faq.answer: The PDF shows calculated values. Formulas are not executable in PDF format.
